title: Darked
body:
# Summary
**Stylistic, consistent and truly dark GUI, HUD**.

 # Features
- Widget changes,
- Icon changes,
- Container changes,
- HUD (health bar, experience bar, hotbar and etc) changes,
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/versions) support.
> 
 # Preview


<details>
<summary>HUD</summary>

![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1f042c8e2a3348c4683e00b1779b554dcff61e7.png)

## Details
- HP bar,
- Hunger bar,
- Armor bar,
- Air bar,
- Hotbar,
- Hotbar selection,
- Crosshair.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Containers</summary>

![Containers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3c39cc977a0b1bf76e02dbc4b4fcfe8ca5f15c_0.webp)

## Details
- Smoker,
- Furnace (i added it on accident),
- Inventory,
- Loom,
- Crafting table.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Icons</summary>

![Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/987bd8e12e6621e833c43e512bf26d68cc651abe_0.webp)

## Details
- Accesibility icon,
- Language icon,
-  Ping icon.

</details>


# Software used
- [Paint.net](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&source=web&rct=j&opi=89978449&url=https://www.getpaint.net/&ved=2ahUKEwivrsDiybSLAxVk-IsKHQc3JZwQFnoECAsQAQ&usg=AOvVaw2STWJsa9mSr2OtvBJFJEoS)
For retexturing sprites, containers and etc.
- [Winrar](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&source=web&rct=j&opi=89978449&url=https://www.win-rar.com/&ved=2ahUKEwiFtITKybSLAxVICBAIHVcuITQQFnoECAkQAQ&usg=AOvVaw2dEhBSHC7SNBzJdfDN-Ys2)
For making a zip file.
